CustomField.description: The field was created by Asana task - https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1210508839133875/task/1210867455268342?focus=true
CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Aircraft__c), TEXT(leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c) , IF(! ISBLANK( leaseworks__World_Fleet_Aircraft__c ), leaseworks__World_Fleet_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__AircraftType__c, IF(! ISBLANK( leaseworks__Engine__c ) , IF( ISBLANK( TEXT(leaseworks__Engine__r.leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c) ) , leaseworks__Engine__r.Model_Type_Local__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Engine__r.leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c) ) , IF( ISBLANK(LEFT( TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) , FIND( "-", TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) , 1 ) - 1 )) , TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) , LEFT( TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) , FIND( "-", TEXT(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c) , 1 ) - 1 )) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Type
